entity.label: Naarah
entity.subtitle: Female
entity.description: A girl, the second of Ashur’s two wives, of the tribe of Judah (1 Chr. 4:5, 6).

nodes.label: Naarah
nodes.description: A girl, the second of Ashur’s two wives, of the tribe of Judah (1 Chr. 4:5, 6).

nodes.label: Hepher
nodes.description: The second son of Asher (1 Chr. 4:6).

nodes.label: Temeni
nodes.description: One of the sons of Ashur, the father of Tekoa (1 Chr. 4:6).

verses.text: And Ashur the father of Tekoa had two wives, Helah and Naarah.
And Naarah bare him Ahuzam, and Hepher, and Temeni, and Haahashtari. These were the sons of Naarah.
